description: Join the Metaplex team for a fireside chat at Breakpoint 2023, discussing the latest announcements and developments in the Solana NFT ecosystem.
topic_summary: The panel covers key announcements from Metaplex, including the decentralization of programmatic keys for Solana NFTs [t=116.28], updates on protocol minting fees [t=129.77], and the introduction of a utility layer aimed at reducing costs and improving data access for CNFTs [t=143.65].
